comply with formularies by making it easier to aggregate LTC prescriptions into 31-day equivalent 
prescriptions and thus compare pricing. CMS imposes edits for the value in this field only when a LTC 
value is provided (i.e., if the value is 16–36), and the patient residence field (the PTNT_RSDNC_CD) 
must equal “03.” Starting with 2025, the LTPAC_DSPNSNG_FREQ_CD is used to identify long-term and
